command.openSettings: Open OpenCode GO Sniffer & Optimizer Settings
config.title: OpenCode GO Copilot Sniffer & Optimizer
command.generateCommit: Generate Commit Message with OpenCode GO Sniffer
command.abortCommit: Generate Commit Message with OpenCode GO Sniffer - Stop
config.commitLanguage.desc: Language for generated Git commit messages. When set to "auto", the language is detected from recent commit history. Defaults to English if no history exists.
config.commitLanguage.auto.desc: Auto-detect language from recent commit history (defaults to English)
config.commitModel.desc: Model ID used for commit message generation.
config.commitMessagePrompt.desc: Custom system prompt for commit message generation.
config.requestTimeout.desc: Maximum time (in milliseconds) for a single request. Default: 600000 (10 minutes). Increase if you encounter timeout errors with long responses.
config.recentCommitsCount.desc: Number of recent commits to analyze for style reference when generating commit messages. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 10.
config.commitIncludeCommitDiff.desc: When enabled, include the actual code changes (diff) of recent commits in the style reference, helping the model generate messages that better match the project's commit style. Default: false.
config.commitAttachContextFiles.desc: When enabled, attach the content of AGENTS.md and README.md from the repository root as additional context for commit message generation, helping the model better understand the project. Default: true.
config.modelPreset.desc: Current model preset ID. Use the 'Set Model Preset' command to select a preset. Set to 'custom' to use manual values from 'opencodegosniffer.temperature' and 'opencodegosniffer.top_p'.
config.temperature.desc: Model temperature (0.0 - 2.0). Paired with 'opencodegosniffer.top_p'. Only used when 'opencodegosniffer.modelPreset' is set to 'custom'.
config.top_p.desc: Model top_p (0.0 - 1.0). Paired with 'opencodegosniffer.temperature'. Only used when 'opencodegosniffer.modelPreset' is set to 'custom'.
config.enableZenFreeModels.desc: Enable OpenCode Zen free models in the model picker. When enabled, the extension fetches the model list from the Zen API and shows free models (Big Pickle, DeepSeek V4 Flash, MiniMax M2.5, Ring 2.6 1T, Nemotron 3 Super). Zen free models are currently NOT supported for git commit message generation. Requires a full reload of VS Code to take effect after changing this setting.
config.modelPresets.desc: Model presets for quick selection via command palette. Each preset includes temperature and top_p. You can customize the presets.
config.modelPreset.id.desc: Preset identifier (must match the value in modelPreset setting).
config.visionProxyModel.desc: Vision model ID used by the describe_image tool to describe attached images when the selected model does not support vision.
config.visionProxyPrompt.desc: Custom prompt sent to the vision model when describing an image via the describe_image tool.
config.visionProxyThinking.desc: Enable thinking/reasoning when describing images via the vision proxy model.
config.enableThirdPartyTokenIndicator.de: Enable the Advanced Token indicator in the status bar. The native Copilot token indicator always shows. When this is enabled, the extension also shows an advanced token counter in the VS Code status bar. Default: true.
walkthrough.title: OpenCode GO Copilot Sniffer & Optimizer
walkthrough.description: Integrate OpenCode GO and optional Zen models into Copilot Chat, then inspect, monitor and optimize upstream requests.
walkthrough.setApiKey.title: Set your OpenCode GO API key
walkthrough.setApiKey.description:
[Get an API key](command:opencodegosniffer.getApiKey) from opencode.ai.
[Set API Key](command:opencodegosniffer.setApiKey)
walkthrough.showModels.title: Show OpenCode GO models
walkthrough.showModels.description:
If the models are hidden, open VS Code's Language Models manager and show the OpenCode GO Sniffer models.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage)
walkthrough.advancedSettings.title: Explore advanced settings
walkthrough.advancedSettings.description:
Customize model presets, enable Zen free models, configure vision proxy, inspect payloads, tune the Sniffer dashboard and optimize request pruning.
[Open settings](command:opencodegosniffer.openSettings)
config.localStatsPortAutoIncrementMax.de: Maximum number of additional ports to try when the local Sniffer port is already in use. For example, with base port 43177 and value 20, the server may bind to 43177-43197.
config.localStatsEnabled.desc: Enable the local HTTP Sniffer dashboard.
config.localStatsPort.desc: Base local port used by the OpenCode GO Sniffer dashboard.
config.localStatsHost.desc: Bind address for the local Sniffer dashboard. Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only access or 0.0.0.0 to expose it on the intranet.
config.localStatsUsePortForwarding.desc: Open the local Sniffer dashboard through VS Code port forwarding when possible. Recommended for Remote SSH. When disabled, dashboard commands use the configured local/intranet URL fallback.
config.localStatsAllowedClients.desc: Comma-separated allowlist of client IPs allowed to access the Sniffer dashboard. Supports exact IPs, IPv4 wildcards like 192.168.1.*, CIDR like 192.168.1.0/24, and netmasks like 192.168.1.0/255.255.255.0.
config.localStatsCapturePayloads.desc: Store full request and response bodies for dashboard inspection. This may include code, prompts, responses, and sensitive data. Disabled by default.
config.localStatsMaxEntries.desc: Maximum number of local request records kept in memory.
config.requestPruningMode.desc: Controls whether request pruning is disabled, previewed, or applied before sending requests upstream.
config.requestPruningMode.preview.desc: Calculate pruning savings but send the original request body.
config.requestPruningMode.enabled.desc: Apply pruning and send the reduced request body upstream.
config.requestPruningRemovePaths.desc: JSON-like paths to remove from request bodies before sending. Supports array wildcards with [], for example: system, tools, messages[].tool_calls.
config.requestPruningRegexRules.desc: Regex replacement rules applied to string fields in request bodies. Each rule has path, pattern, optional flags, and optional replacement.
